name: spec-kit
description: Specification-driven development with domain analysis and MCP compliance validation
long_description: Complete MCP server for specification-driven development workflow. Includes feature specification creation, implementation planning, task breakdown, domain analysis, and MCP compliance validation tools. Automatically extracts business entities and rules from data files to populate templates with real, data-driven content.

tools.name: specify
tools.description: Create feature specifications from natural language descriptions

tools.name: plan
tools.description: Generate detailed implementation plans from specifications

tools.name: tasks
tools.description: Break down implementation plans into structured tasks

tools.name: initialize
tools.description: Initialize project with spec-kit configuration and templates

tools.name: analyze_domain
tools.description: Extract business entities and rules from data files

tools.name: validate_compliance
tools.description: Validate MCP server compliance with specifications

tools.name: analyze_mcp_tools
tools.description: Analyze and inspect MCP tool implementations

resources.name: templates
resources.description: Specification and domain templates for various project types

resources.name: sample_data
resources.description: Sample datasets for domain analysis testing

user_config.name: default_domain_type
user_config.description: Default domain type for analysis (financial, ecommerce, crm)
